name: Ocean Bedrock Week-One Launch Workflow
purpose: Make Ocean Bedrock accessible as a functional, authenticated cloud-box tool for coworkers and agents: deploy service, issue tokens, expose MCP, bootstrap local folder feeds, and start ingestion into the Ocean knowledge layer.

canonicalBoundaries.oceanDaemon: Local runtime/body and execution authority. Owns local sessions, events, tools, provider execution, local filesystem/shell/destructive permissions.
canonicalBoundaries.oceanLonghouse: Hive brain / coordination layer per ocean-os/docs/LONGHOUSE.md. Coordinates skills, SOPs, routines, MCP discovery, memory, subagents, quorum/council logic. Does not bypass daemon permissions.
canonicalBoundaries.oceanBedrock: Cloud-box support substrate for shared files, context ingest, ledger/event store, Postgres/R2/Vectorize/KV, MCP-facing infrastructure, and coworker bootstrap. Does not redefine Longhouse.

phases.title: Pin canonical boundaries
tasks: Read ocean-os/docs/LONGHOUSE.md and LONGHOUSE_ORCHESTRATION.md before changing Longhouse semantics.
Keep Ocean Bedrock documented as cloud-box support substrate, not replacement Longhouse.
Record any uncertain product naming as open decision, not fact.
acceptance: Docs do not claim Bedrock is the quorum engine.
Docs state Longhouse is the hive brain / coordination layer.
README links week-one and coworker bootstrap docs.

phases.title: Deploy Ocean Bedrock as reachable HTTPS service
tasks: Create or configure dedicated Railway service for ocean-bedrock.
Set PORT, OCEAN_BEDROCK_ROOT, OCEAN_LEDGER_STORE=postgres, DATABASE_URL.
Apply db/001_longhouse_core.sql and db/002_ocean_ledger.sql if not already ready.
Expose through Railway/Cloudflare HTTPS route.
Verify /health and /api/v1/info with bearer token.
acceptance: Public HTTPS /health returns ok for this service.
Authenticated /api/v1/info shows instance ocean-bedrock and ledger store postgres.
npm run db:check reports schemaReady=true.

phases.title: Issue scoped coworker/MCP tokens
tasks: Define path scope convention: /coworkers/<name>, /sessions/<name>, /context/ocean-bedrock.
Issue one agent token per coworker/device or per coworker initially.
Store only token hashes server-side; send raw token once through secure channel.
Document revoke/rotate procedure.
acceptance: At least one non-admin scoped token can bootstrap and ingest.
Admin token is not used by coworker bootstrap.
Token revocation endpoint verified.

phases.title: Expose Ocean Bedrock as MCP tools/resources
tasks: Add MCP server wrapper around HTTP API using same bearer token.
Expose resources: ocean-bedrock://docs, /context, /coworkers, /sessions, /handoffs.
Expose tools: bedrock_list, bedrock_read, bedrock_write, bedrock_search, bedrock_lock, bedrock_unlock, bedrock_trace, bedrock_snapshot.
Avoid destructive delete by default; require explicit separate permission or admin token.
acceptance: Agent can list/read/write scoped paths through MCP token.
Agent can create context snapshot through MCP.
Unauthorized path access fails.

phases.title: Coworker local-folder selection and first sync
tasks: Use npm run ocean:bootstrap to select folders and save ~/.config/ocean-bedrock/bootstrap.json.
Use npm run ocean:ingest -- --dry-run before upload.
Run npm run ocean:ingest for first upload.
Write redacted source manifest and ingest manifest to /context/ocean-bedrock.
acceptance: A coworker can choose folders without editing config manually.
Dry-run reports scan totals.
First upload writes files under /coworkers/<name>/<device> and emits ledger event.

phases.title: Index files into Ocean knowledge layer
tasks: Create ingest worker loop over longhouse.ingest_jobs.
On file write/upload, enqueue index_object/embed_object/extract_graph jobs.
Extract text for plain docs/code first; defer PDFs/Office to later if needed.
Chunk text, store chunk metadata in Postgres, embed with Cloudflare Workers AI, upsert to Vectorize ocean-longhouse-context.
Create basic graph nodes/edges for file/source/coworker/project/session relationships.
Cache hot stats/search in OCEAN_LONGHOUSE_CACHE only as rebuildable cache.
acceptance: Uploaded markdown/text file becomes searchable semantically or at least chunk-indexed.
Postgres has object/chunk/job records.
Vectorize upsert path is verified with a test query.

phases.title: Security and launch review
tasks: Review token scopes, bootstrap config permissions, secret exclusion defaults, logs, and deletion policy.
Confirm no raw tokens are written to shared manifests.
Confirm public endpoints require intended auth except /health/openapi if intentionally public.
Create operator rollback/revoke steps.
acceptance: Security checklist passes.
Coworker onboarding can proceed with scoped tokens.
Known gaps are documented as blocked/future, not implied complete.

launchDefinitionOfDone: Ocean Bedrock is reachable over HTTPS.
Postgres schemaReady=true and ledger store is postgres.
At least one scoped coworker token works end-to-end.
MCP wrapper exposes list/read/write/search/snapshot against scoped paths.
Coworker bootstrap selects local folders and creates config.
Ingest uploads changed files and emits ledger events.
At least one uploaded file is indexed into the knowledge layer.
Security review approves token scope and secret-handling defaults.
openDecisions: Exact public hostname for Ocean Bedrock.
Whether MCP server runs inside this Node service or as separate ocean-mcp process.
Which file types are allowed in week-one automatic ingestion beyond text/code/markdown.
Whether background sync is user-launched only or installed as a local service/LaunchAgent later.
Whether /health stays public or requires auth behind Cloudflare.
